drl:
rule "R2"
when
    T2($b2_0_1 : f1)
    accumulate( T0($s2_2 : f1); $a2_2 : average($s2_2) )
    $a2_1 : ArrayList() from collect( T0(f0 > "ab", f2 == false) )
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T2($b3_0_0 : f1, f3 == false)
then
    $p3_0.setF3(true);
    $p3_0.setF1($b3_0_0);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0()
then
    insert(new T2($p4_0.getF1(), $p4_0.getF1(), -3.0, $p4_0.isF2()));
end
name: lu_d
